sub_modules.fft64_sign_extend: Combinational signed extension from input precision to internal/output precision.
sub_modules.fft64_twiddle_rom: Combinational fixed-point twiddle-factor lookup table for 64-point FFT rotations.
sub_modules.fft64_complex_mult: Combinational fixed-point complex multiplier using Q1.15 twiddle factors.
sub_modules.fft64_radix2_butterfly: Combinational radix-2 butterfly producing complex sum and difference terms.
sub_modules.fft64_stage_select: Combinational selector that chooses the upper or lower butterfly path for each pipeline stage.
